claim: Localization-guided anomaly crops improve VLM reasoning over full-image prompting.
evidence: MVTec AD PatchCore Top-1 improves from 0.2850 to 0.3388; VisA PatchCore AUROC improves from 0.5950 to 0.8844; VisA FastFlow AUROC improves from 0.5950 to 0.9222.
risk_if_overstated: Do not claim universal improvement on all datasets/backbones without further evidence.

claim: The proposed localization-to-reasoning pipeline generalizes across datasets.
evidence: The effect is observed on MVTec AD defect-type reasoning and VisA binary normal/anomaly reasoning.
risk_if_overstated: Tasks differ across datasets, so phrase as cross-dataset evidence rather than identical-task proof.

claim: The pipeline is not tied to PatchCore and can generalize to another anomaly backbone.
evidence: On VisA, PatchCore crop_topk_ensemble reaches AUROC 0.8844; FastFlow crop_topk_ensemble reaches AUROC 0.9222. Both improve substantially over full-image AUROC 0.5950.
risk_if_overstated: Only PatchCore and FastFlow are tested; do not claim all anomaly detectors.

claim: Candidate localization quality is important for downstream reasoning.
evidence: PatchCore candidate coverage on VisA is 1.0000; FastFlow candidate coverage on VisA is 0.9992. Both high-coverage settings produce strong crop reasoning gains.
risk_if_overstated: Coverage alone does not prove crop quality; include as supporting rather than sole evidence.

claim: The method should not be presented as a pixel-perfect segmentation method.
evidence: PatchCore pixel F1 on VisA is 0.1814; FastFlow pixel F1 on VisA is 0.2573. Reasoning improves despite limited pixel-level F1.
risk_if_overstated: Avoid claiming segmentation quality as the main contribution.

claim: The current experiments validate visual anomaly-region reasoning, not full manufacturing-cause discovery.
evidence: Experiments evaluate defect-type or binary normal/anomaly reasoning from visual crops. They do not validate unknown causal mechanism discovery.
risk_if_overstated: Do not claim automatic discovery of all manufacturing causes.
